Oh Story with Oh Story KR
Sponsored
In this case, we will look at the simultaneous implant placement and sinus graft performed on the maxillary posterior region (sites #16 and #17) of a 62-year-old male patient.

Significant alveolar bone loss was already observed, and post-extraction panoramic imaging also revealed limited bone height due to pneumatization in the maxillary sinus.

Therefore, Prof. Jae-eun Chung planned to perform implant placement and maxillary sinus bone grafting simultaneously and chose the lateral approach method.

Swipe to find out why Prof. Jae-eun Chung selected the lateral approach in this live surgery and how the delicate procedure was actually performed—check out the video via the link below!

https://bit.ly/ossurgery7

-

#OnlineSurgery #DentalClinicalCase
#EFRKIT #DentalImplant

SHINING 3D DENTAL
Sponsored
🎓 From Scan to Smile: Learning Lounge

Get ready for an inspiring learning experience led by top dental professionals!

"From Scan to Smile: Learning Lounge" brings together leading dental experts who will share their expertise and experience.
🦷Discover how advanced technologies are transforming patient care - from using virtual tools to analyze jaw motion and plan full-mouth rehabilitations, to optimizing same-day treatments through fully digital workflows.
🦷Discover how precise face scanning, intraoral photogrammetry, and chairside 3D printing can enhance accuracy, efficiency, and outcomes in implant and full-arch restorations.
🦷 Discover how to bring precision and efficiency to every step.

Featured Speakers:

🎤 Dr. Oscar Vargas Fernández, Professor of Prosthodontics
Topic: Keys to Success for Optimizing Accuracy in the Digital Workflow (SPANISH)
When: 6:30 PM (San José, Costa Rica Time) on the 28th of October, 2025

🎤 Dr. Henriette Lerner, PhD, FDS RCS
Topic: From Scan to Smile, Same Day Treatments with Full Digital Workflow
When: 7 PM (CEST) on the 30th of October

🎤 Dr. Dimitris Tasakos, DSD
Topic: Understanding the Importance of Face-scan in the Contemporary Digital Workflow
When: 7 PM (CEST) on the 3rd of November, 2025

🎤 Dr. Abbas Abdollah Nejad, DDS
Topic: The Power of Virtualization in Full-Mouth Rehabilitation
When: 3:30 PM IRST (UTC+3:30) on the 6th of November, 2025

🎤 Prof. dr Miodrag Šćepanović, PhD in Dental Implantology
Topic: From Implants to Accuracy: Full-Arch Rehabilitation with Intraoral Photogrammetry (IPG)
When: 8 PM (CEST) on the 8th of November, 2025

🎤 Dr Majd Mouelhi, Doctor of Dentistry
Topic: Réhabilitations Complètes : L’Ère de la Photogrammétrie de Précision (FRENCH)
When: 10 AM (CET) on the 20th of November, 2025  

🎤 Dr. Mark Kleive, DDS
Topic: Utilizing Jaw Motion Tracking Technology as a Virtual Articulator
When: 7 PM (ET) / 4 PM (PT) on the 8th of December, 2025

🎤 Dr. Sameh Shaaban, Oral & Maxillofacial Surgeon
Topic: Chairside 3D Printing Excellence: Redefining One-Appointment Dentistry
When: 4 PM（GMT +3）on the 11th of December, 2025 

🎤 Prof. Dr. Abdelrahman Khalaf, BDS, MSc, PhD
Topic: From Scan to Smile: Optimizing Digital Workflows with Intraoral Photogrammetry
When: 4 PM (GMT+3) on the 17th of December, 2025  

Sign up today to learn from leading experts in the field!
